questions.statement: With reference to the Constituent Assembly, who among the following was the chairman at the time of the inauguration of the Interim (Provisional) Central Constitutional Committee?
How many minimum seats were kept for the representatives of the princely states in the Constituent Assembly?
What was the number of women members in the Constituent Assembly?
Who was the chairman of the Committee on the Rules of Procedure of the Constituent Assembly?&nbsp;
Who was the chairman of the States Committee of the Constituent Assembly?
